tasks.description: Implement position lifecycle management in trading/position.py.
acceptance_criteria: PositionLifecycle provides pure functions: open_position(), close_position(), update_stop(), update_target().
Each function takes a Position (from core.types) and returns a new frozen Position plus a list of Actions.
open_position() requires a BeliefSnapshot and computes initial stop/target from config defaults.
close_position() records the close reason and produces a ClosePosition action.
No I/O in any function — pure state transitions only.
Tests cover open, close, stop update, target update, and rejection of invalid transitions.

tasks.description: Implement position sizing via Kelly criterion with CI bounds in trading/sizing.py.
acceptance_criteria: kelly_fraction() computes the Kelly fraction from win probability and payoff ratio.
bounded_kelly() constrains the Kelly result using the lower bound of a configurable confidence interval (default 95%).
size_position_usd() returns the USD amount to allocate given portfolio value, Kelly fraction, and MIN/MAX_POSITION_USD bounds.
All calculations use Decimal arithmetic.
Tests cover: normal Kelly, edge cases (0% win rate, 100% win rate, zero payoff), CI bounding, and min/max clamping.

tasks.description: Implement portfolio management in trading/portfolio.py with USD accounting and DOGE accumulation logic.
acceptance_criteria: PortfolioManager provides pure functions: apply_fill(), apply_close(), compute_concentration(), compute_directional_exposure().
apply_fill() updates Portfolio (from core.types) with a new or modified position, returning a new frozen Portfolio.
apply_close() removes a position, updates cash_usd, and optionally queues a DOGE accumulation action if DOGE is bullish.
compute_concentration() returns per-pair allocation percentages.
compute_directional_exposure() returns net long minus net short as a percentage of total value.
All functions are pure — take state in, return new state out.
Tests cover fills, closes, concentration math, directional exposure, and DOGE accumulation path.

tasks.description: Implement risk rules enforcement in trading/risk_rules.py.
acceptance_criteria: check_position_rules() validates: stop-loss is set, position size is within Kelly bounds, re-entry cooldown is respected.
check_portfolio_rules() validates: max positions, max same-side concentration (60%), max single-pair allocation (15%), max drawdown soft (10%) and hard (15%) limits.
RiskCheckResult is a frozen dataclass containing: passed (bool), violations (list of typed violation objects), and recommended_action.
Soft drawdown (10%) blocks new entries. Hard drawdown (15%) produces ClosePosition actions for all positions.
All functions are pure — no I/O.
Tests cover: clean portfolio (all pass), each violation type individually, soft vs hard drawdown, and combined violations.

tasks.description: Implement Kraken state reconciler in trading/reconciler.py.
acceptance_criteria: reconcile() takes Kraken state (balances, open orders, trade history) and Supabase state (positions, orders) and returns a ReconciliationReport.
ReconciliationReport is a frozen dataclass listing: ghost_positions, foreign_orders, fee_drift, untracked_assets, and severity per discrepancy.
Ghost position detection: positions in Supabase with no matching Kraken open orders or recent fills.
Foreign order detection: Kraken orders without matching cl_ord_id prefix.
Foreign order classification: new, acked, stale (age-based), with recommended actions.
Auto-fix rules: LOW severity discrepancies get an auto_fix action. HIGH severity produces an alert action.
All functions are pure — take state snapshots in, return report out.
Tests cover: clean state (no discrepancies), ghost position, foreign order lifecycle, fee drift detection, and severity classification.

tasks.description: Implement the guardian autonomous position monitor in guardian.py.
acceptance_criteria: Guardian provides check_positions() that takes current prices, portfolio, and config, and returns a list of GuardianActions.
Stop monitoring: flags positions where price has reached or breached the stop level.
Target monitoring: flags positions where price has reached or breached the target level.
Belief staleness: flags positions whose belief is older than BELIEF_STALE_HOURS.
Risk enforcement: delegates to trading/risk_rules.py for portfolio-level checks.
GuardianAction is a frozen dataclass with action type (limit_exit_attempt, stop_triggered, target_hit, belief_stale, risk_violation) and details.
Guardian is under 500 lines. It does exactly three things per SPEC.md: stop/target monitoring, risk rule enforcement, belief staleness.
Tests cover: stop hit, target hit, stale belief, clean portfolio, multiple simultaneous triggers.

tasks.description: Implement the main loop scheduler in scheduler.py.
acceptance_criteria: Scheduler class provides run_cycle() that orchestrates one iteration of the main loop.
Cycle steps: (1) check guardian, (2) check belief staleness, (3) run reconciliation, (4) process any pending belief signals, (5) process grid cycles, (6) emit state update for dashboard SSE.
run_cycle() is a pure orchestration function that takes current state and returns (new_state, actions_to_execute).
SchedulerConfig is a frozen dataclass with cycle_interval_sec, reconcile_interval_sec, and guardian_interval_sec.
Scheduler is under 500 lines.
Tests cover: a clean cycle with no actions needed, a cycle that triggers guardian stop, a cycle that triggers reconciliation, and a cycle that processes a belief update.
